name: Amrut
text: Happy Birthday, Dad! You are my hero, my teacher, and my biggest inspiration. Thank you for always believing in me.

name: Mom
text: To my loving husband and the anchor of our family. Thank you for your support and strength. Wishing you a wonderful birthday!

name: Grandpa
text: Proud of the man, husband, and father you have become. Wishing you health and peace on your special day.

name: Sister
text: Happy Birthday to the coolest dad in the universe! Thanks for all the laughs and late-night snacks. Love you loads!
